title: BEM-876 curator request v1.4
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM876_PROTOCOL_V14_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-876 PROTOCOL V1.4 REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> internal contour -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: agree protocol v1.4 after operator review of v1.3.
Base documents: BEM872 v1.2, BEM875 v1.3, operator discussion, AI agents summary, Business Model Canvas source, open-source multiagent practice.
Required fixes:
- Preserve v1.2 high-level line and do not lose previous content when adding details.
- Replace control plane wording with управляющий контур.
- Clarify role/object/component terminology: Director and Worker are role-objects; Curator is internal component inside any role-object.
- General Director level is added above Directors.
- Replace реестр времени with журнал событий.
- Unify workspace terms: рабочая область only; integration/testing areas are special workspaces.
- Merge audit/integration duplication into контур тестирования.
- Main verified code location is основная рабочая область.
- Task registry cannot rely on GitHub Issues because of limits; use scalable task registry.
- Use only selected managed shared channel model, no rejected option tables unless needed as rationale.
- Add rule system: rules store error conditions, decisions, duplicates/conflicts handling, and are authored by Directors/General Director.
- Add cross-repository rule distribution and feedback from product repos.
- Clarify product repository link to управляющий контур.
- Expand business scope from small tasks/CRM to ERP and enterprise production management.
- Redesign roadmap with detailed task IDs to build the actual system.
Required internal outputs: Analyst review, Auditor review, Curator response.
Required final status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
